keys.purpose: Slot under which the inbound auth runtime writes the populated DcsvIo.D2.Context.Abstractions.IRequestContext on successful auth. HTTP middleware writes to HttpContext.Items[REQUEST_CONTEXT]; gRPC interceptor mirrors the write to ServerCallContext.UserState[REQUEST_CONTEXT] AND HttpContext.Items[REQUEST_CONTEXT] (gRPC-on-AspNetCore-Kestrel always has an HttpContext). Cross-binding identical value is what makes the cross-transport scoped IRequestContext resolver lambda work.
